title: Designing RBAC policy for a new multi-tenant partition
query_text: We are creating a new restricted partition for sensitive genomics data. Design the RBAC policy: which roles should have access, what access tiers apply, and what audit logging is required?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Restricted partition RBAC design: (1) Access: scientific_user and researcher require PI-approved project membership; sysadmin has full access; facility_admin has read-only for power monitoring; system_designer has infrastructure access only. (2) Tiers: Tier-3 restricted for user jobs, Tier-4 for admin actions. (3) Audit: all job submissions, privilege escalations, and data egress must be logged to a tamper-evident audit trail with 90-day retention. (4) SLURM QoS: separate QoS for restricted partition with reservation enforcement.
